film.title: Bandini
film.overview: In 1930s British-ruled Bengal, a prison-doctor falls in love with a convicted murderer with past connections to a freedom fighter.

dialogues.dialogue: You! What are you doing here? You were secretly overhearing our conversation! Shameless! - What's the matter, Shivani? Who're you getting angry on? - You sit calmly! She's a shameless maid! I'll teach her a lesson today!

Shameless! - What's the matter, Shivani? Who're you getting angry on? - You sit calmly! She's a shameless maid! I'll teach her a lesson today! I'll complain to the doctor about you! I'll get you thrown out of here! Get lost!

For this work, very often he had to stay out many days. But dad never stopped or restricted him. He was proud of him. Once, 10 miles away from a village....a flood occurred at the river due to rains. Brother immediately went there with his group.
